anomalies.message: THYAO icin konsensusten %12 pozitif ayrisan yeni rapor, manuel kontrol gerekir.

revisions.message: BIMAS icin son 30 gunde tekrar eden yukari yonlu hedef fiyat revizyonu izlendi.

market_context.why: Prices embed expectations, so the report should show whether the narrative is optimistic or pessimistic.
market_context.where: Research tabs, broker revisions and market prices

market_context.why: Valuation multiples and risk appetite are sensitive to policy rate and TRY moves.
Top names move differently from thin names; liquidity and float should affect ranking.
market_context.where: Borsa Istanbul equity market and indices pages

market_context.why: KAP disclosures can invalidate a target-price assumption very quickly.

next_actions: Implement consensus engine output so the report can compare current price, average target and median target.
Add broker count filter so single-broker names are visually separated from consensus names.
Keep manual approval on until KAP, macro and consensus checks are wired into the pipeline.
